title: Allergen cross-reactivity families
description: Baked allergen cross-reactivity families (issue #153) — well-established, clinically static cross-reaction clusters (birch-OAS, latex-fruit, crustacean tropomyosin, finned-fish parvalbumin, mammalian-milk caseins, tree-nut and legume clusters). Backs informational cross-reaction notes and the #691 allergy safety belt. INFORMATIONAL, never diagnostic — cross-reactivity does not mean a reaction is certain. Each family carries a peer-reviewed literature citation. Committed + HUMAN-REVIEWABLE; regenerate with `npm run gen:allergen-cross-reactivity`.

citation.source: Published allergy literature — pollen-food (Werfel 2015), latex-fruit (Blanco 1994), shellfish tropomyosin (Lopata 2010), fish parvalbumin (Sharp & Lopata 2014), mammalian-milk caseins (Restani 1999), tree-nut (Goetz 2005), and peanut–lupin (Moneret-Vautrin 1999) cross-reactivity.
citation.note: Generic clinical reference data (not patient data, not medical advice); each family additionally carries its own peer-reviewed `citation`.

entries.name: Birch pollen (oral allergy syndrome)
entries.label: oral allergy syndrome, birch pollen (PR-10)
entries.citation: Werfel T, et al. Position paper: Pollen-food syndrome. Allergy 2015;70:1079-1090.

entries.name: Ragweed pollen (oral allergy syndrome)
entries.label: oral allergy syndrome, ragweed pollen
entries.citation: Enberg RN, et al. Ragweed-melon association. Ann Allergy 1987;58:59-63.

entries.name: Mugwort pollen (celery-spice syndrome)
entries.label: celery-mugwort-spice syndrome
entries.citation: Wuthrich B, et al. Celery-carrot-mugwort-spice syndrome. Int Arch Allergy Immunol 1990;93:399-404.

entries.name: Latex-fruit syndrome
entries.label: latex-fruit syndrome (latex commonly cross-reacts with fruit)
entries.citation: Blanco C, et al. Latex-fruit syndrome. Ann Allergy Asthma Immunol 1994;73:309-314.

entries.name: Crustacean shellfish group
entries.label: crustacean shellfish (shared tropomyosin)
entries.citation: Lopata AL, et al. Shellfish allergy. Clin Exp Allergy 2010;40:850-858.

entries.name: Mollusk shellfish group
entries.label: mollusk shellfish (shared tropomyosin)
entries.citation: Lopata AL, et al. Shellfish allergy. Clin Exp Allergy 2010;40:850-858.

entries.name: Cashew / pistachio tree-nut cluster
entries.label: cashew-pistachio tree-nut cluster
entries.citation: Goetz DW, et al. Cashew-pistachio and walnut-pecan tree nut cross-reactivity. Ann Allergy Asthma Immunol 2005;95:45-52.

entries.name: Walnut / pecan tree-nut cluster
entries.label: walnut-pecan tree-nut cluster
entries.citation: Goetz DW, et al. Cashew-pistachio and walnut-pecan tree nut cross-reactivity. Ann Allergy Asthma Immunol 2005;95:45-52.

entries.name: Mammalian milk group
entries.label: mammalian milk (cow, goat, sheep share caseins)
entries.citation: Restani P, et al. Cross-reactivity between milk proteins from different animal species. Clin Exp Allergy 1999;29:997-1004.

entries.name: Finned fish group (parvalbumin)
entries.label: finned fish (shared parvalbumin)
entries.citation: Sharp MF, Lopata AL. Fish allergy: in review. Clin Rev Allergy Immunol 2014;46:258-271.

entries.name: Peanut / lupin legume group
entries.label: peanut and lupin (cross-reacting legumes)
entries.citation: Moneret-Vautrin DA, et al. Cross-allergenicity of peanut and lupine. Allergy 1999;54:643-645.
